nodes.name: 温带森林
nodes.summary: 温带岛屿或山地森林生态系统。

nodes.name: Blue-headed vireo
nodes.summary: Blue-headed vireo（Blue-headed vireo，学名 Vireo solitarius），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括温带森林、沼泽。

nodes.name: 北美洲
nodes.summary: 北美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联97种鸟类，包括紅嘴樹鴨、黑嘴天鹅、加拿大雁等97种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 中美洲
nodes.summary: 中美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联125种鸟类，包括大䳍、小穴䳍、灰胸穴䳍等125种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Alexander Wilson (ornithologist)
nodes.summary: Alexander Wilson (ornithologist)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括帆背潛鴨、Blue-headed vireo、北美星鸦等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The blue-headed vireo (Vireo solitarius) is a migrating song bird found in North and Central America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The blue-headed vireo (Vireo solitarius) is a migrating song bird found in North and Central America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Native to North America, the blue-headed vireo enjoys a large breeding range that extends over an immense area of Canada and northern United States

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: alticola migrates across a shorter distance to an area that extends from southeastern Virginia to Texas. Blue-headed vireos prefer to breed in cool temperate forests, which in the southern part of its breeding range are found at higher elevations

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: They are also found in coastal and flood plain swamps and low shrubby thickets. Year round, even during the breeding season, population density is somewhat low and spread out
